citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 11:00am on
Wednesday, April 22, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee and was informed by a family member that
the licensee was away for the day and not expected back for several hours. Failure to provide access to the facility,
animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is
serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 11:00am on 
Wednesday, April 22, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee and was informed by a family member that 
the licensee was away for the day and not expected back for several hours. Failure to provide access to the facility, 
animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is 
serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
